title: SCN-01: Bootstrap recipe-sharing app vision and PRD
description:
Bootstrap a recipe-sharing app from sparse user intent into governed artifacts (vision.md and prd.md).

Intent: Build a recipe-sharing app for amateur cooks. Users browse, save, and post recipes; they can like and comment on recipes they find. Include basic ratings and reviews. Design it to be mobile-first so people can access it anywhere.

This bead exercises HELIX SCN-01 (bootstrap from intent → vision + PRD) and validates the HELIX skill activation within the DDx reference runtime.
acceptance: Produces docs/helix/00-discover/product-vision.md with ddx: frontmatter containing id, status, and type fields
Produces docs/helix/01-frame/prd.md with ddx: frontmatter containing id, status, and depends_on: [helix.product-vision]
product-vision.md contains required sections: ## Problem Space, ## Vision Statement
prd.md contains required sections: ## Overview, ## User Personas, ## Features, ## Success Metrics
Both files are valid markdown with proper frontmatter YAML syntax
